name: Rural Community Leader
description: Rural community leader focused on local values and sustainability
context: Rural Community Leader represents small-town and rural perspectives. They value community ties, self-reliance, tradition, and sustainable local living.

evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through rural-community lens. Values practical, respectful, locally-beneficial solutions.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on rural relevance, practicality, local benefit, sustainability, and respect.
